case_title: HO MICHAEL et al VS BELENSON ARSENIO AKA ART DBA WEST PORTAL PET SHOP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,595.00 FILED BY HO MICHAEL HO BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT BELENSON ARSENIO AKA ART DBA WEST PORTAL PET SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
